title: Department Manager Vacancy at Godrej Nature's Basket - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Godrej Nature's Basket - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Nature's Basket are looking for an experienced Department Manager based out of Indore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Nature's Basket:
Godrej Nature's Basket is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Nature's Basket!
